author: DominicVainMod
content:
The Weekly Star Atlas Roadmap Scan #21 is out!

In this issue, politics! Asha, captain of the Council of Peace, is invited for a curious meeting in the legendary Iris Academy.

Learn everything about this and star atlas's latest developments here: https://medium.com/star-atlas/the-council-of-peace-academy-mission-showroom-star-atlas-roadmap-scan-21-36f38988861
